rooms.name: Troll's Den

monsters.name: Troll
monsters.note: charmed by Halaster: fetches meat daily from 19a for the manticores in 16

rooms.gm_note: Putrid stench forewarns. Dispel magic (DC 15) ends the charm, not the temper.

rooms.name: Manticore Den

monsters.name: Manticore
monsters.note: attack all but Halaster and the charmed troll

rooms.gm_note: Companion: the manticores speak Common — have them mock and goad, and remember they fly. Nest treasure includes a 250 gp bloodstone necklace. Scrying eye appears if the party returns later.

rooms.name: Beyond the Green Door
rooms.gm_note: Harmless green door with iron face. Empty room — or your hook into an expanded dungeon.

rooms.label: 17a
rooms.name: Foyer

monsters.name: Giant Centipede
monsters.note: inside the basilisk corpse; emerge if disturbed

rooms.gm_note: Dead basilisk on its back clutches a driftglobe (pry the claw open).

rooms.label: 19a
rooms.name: Servants' Feast Hall
rooms.gm_note: Conjured rotting meat appears on the tables at dawn; the troll from 18 feeds here daily.

rooms.label: 17b
rooms.name: Desecrated Temple

monsters.name: Black Pudding
monsters.note: 120 hp; in stasis coating the Gond statue until touched or harmed

rooms.gm_note: Eleven petrified adventurers and monsters clustered at the south end. Copper crown (75 gp) on the carrion crawler’s tentacle.

rooms.label: 19b
rooms.name: Guards' Feast Hall
rooms.gm_note: Copper tankard (25 gp) under a table.

rooms.label: 19c
rooms.name: Nobles' Feast Hall
rooms.gm_note: Door blocked by a dead dwarf burglar; her nearly complete burglar’s pack lies on a bench.
